page_content:
Total Credit Limit Reached

You have reached the maximum credit limit for the term (16 credits prior to first day of classes, or 20 credits on or after first day of classes).

To request permission for a credit overload, submit an exception to policy request following your academic advising college instructions.

Undergrad student taking graduate course

You are an undergraduate student attempting to register for a graduate level course.

To request an exception to register for a graduate level course, submit an exception to policy request following your academic advising college instructions.

9
